sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47094" key="h(miqalh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἡμι-θᾰλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θάλλω</etym>) <sense id="n47094.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-green</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">στέφανοι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.465</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
